meaning: n.搅拌器,搅拌者,搅拌用杓子
examples: You're gonna be a stirrer? - No one's listening to me!
Home Application: Vacuum cleaner, Stirrer, High speed fan.
You're not funny! You're going into honey. Our son, the stirrer !
It's best to avoid the cheaper models, which feel as solid as a coffee stirrer.
Also dropping off: Plaxico Burress (gun bust), Ndamkong Suh (dirty play), and Terrell Owens (all-around pot stirrer), memories of whom are fading quickly.
